message:
feat: implement remote-mode VT feed pipeline, scrollback viewport, and width policy

Remote-mode terminal emulation (frankenterm-web):
Fully implement the WASM-side VT byte-stream feed pipeline that
parses raw PTY/WebSocket data through TerminalEngine, snapshots
patches via the new core_patch_to_patches() bridge in patch_feed.rs,
and applies them to the shadow grid and renderer. This eliminates
host-side JS parsing overhead and enables standalone terminal
emulation. New drain_reply_bytes() surfaces terminal query responses
(DA/DSR/CPR/DECRPM) back to the JS host.

Scrollback viewport management:
Add scroll_lines_nav, scroll_pages_nav, scroll_to_top/bottom/line_nav,
viewport_state, viewport_lines, and snapshot_scrollback_frame_jsonl
APIs. Implement follow-output semantics: auto-scroll when at bottom,
anchor viewport when user scrolls up, re-enable on return to bottom.
Wheel input now scrolls the viewport when mouse reporting is disabled.
Viewport anchor is preserved across resize and content changes.

Pluggable Unicode width policy (frankenterm-core):
Add WidthPolicy enum (Standard / CjkAmbiguousWide) so CJK and Western
users both get correct character rendering. Width is now computed once
at the engine entry point via write_printable_with_width(), avoiding
redundant per-cell lookups deep in Grid.

Renderer backend abstraction:
Add RendererBackendPreference (Auto/WebGpu/Canvas2d) and coalesce
adjacent CellPatch runs into PatchWriteSpan groups to reduce
queue.write_buffer() overhead from the bursty VT feed pipeline.

Test simplification:
Replace hand-rolled CoreTerminalHarness in 4 test files with thin
TerminalEngine wrappers, deleting ~1,600 lines of duplicated action-
dispatch logic that had to be maintained in parallel with the engine.

Performance benchmarks:
Add 3 xterm-like workload benchmarks (PromptEdit, LogBurst,
FullscreenRepaint) at 80x24 and 120x40. Add ftui-extras opt-level=3
override for SIMD optimization in release builds. Update bench budget
gates for the new workloads.

Also sync beads issue tracker and add 4 known mismatch entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,4 +31,7 @@ codegen-units = 1
 panic = "abort"
 strip = true
 
+# VFX-heavy crate: prefer speed over binary size so the rasterizer
 # inner loops benefit from SIMD, loop unrolling, and aggressive inlining.
+[profile.release.package.ftui-extras]
+opt-level = 3

@@ -131,6 +131,14 @@ declare -A BUDGETS=(
     ["web/frame_harness_stats/sparse_5pct/120x40"]=40000
     ["web/frame_harness_stats/heavy_50pct/120x40"]=40000
 
+    # Comparative xterm-like workload profiles (bd-2vr05.8.5)
+    ["web/xterm_workloads/prompt_edit/80x24"]=25000
+    ["web/xterm_workloads/log_burst/80x24"]=45000
+    ["web/xterm_workloads/fullscreen_repaint/80x24"]=90000
+    ["web/xterm_workloads/prompt_edit/120x40"]=40000
+    ["web/xterm_workloads/log_burst/120x40"]=70000
+    ["web/xterm_workloads/fullscreen_repaint/120x40"]=220000
+
     # Glyph atlas cache (bd-lff4p.2.4)
     ["web/glyph_atlas_cache/miss_insert_single"]=5000
     ["web/glyph_atlas_cache/hit_hot_path"]=250
@@ -318,8 +326,8 @@ run_benchmarks() {
         fi
         local bench_filters=("")
         if [[ "$pkg" == "frankenterm-web" && "$bench" == "renderer_bench" && "$QUICK_MODE" == "true" ]]; then
-            # Quick-mode still validates web frame-time harness and glyph-atlas cache gates.
-            bench_filters=("frame_harness_stats" "glyph_atlas_cache")
+            # Quick-mode validates web frame-time harness, xterm-like profiles, and glyph-atlas gates.
+            bench_filters=("frame_harness_stats" "xterm_workloads" "glyph_atlas_cache")
         fi
 
         local append_mode=false

@@ -1 +1,5 @@
 # id|cols|rows|input_hex|root_cause
+irm_plus_lnm|10|3|1b5b34681b5b32306841424344451b5b48580a59|IRM+LNM newline column semantics diverge from VirtualTerminal reference
+lnm_newline_does_cr|10|3|1b5b3230684142430a44|LINEFEED_NEWLINE mode semantics diverge from VirtualTerminal reference
+lnm_newline_mode|10|5|1b5b32306841424344450a464748|LINEFEED_NEWLINE mode semantics diverge from VirtualTerminal reference
+newline_with_lnm|10|3|4142431b5b3230680a44|LINEFEED_NEWLINE mode semantics diverge from VirtualTerminal reference
